title: KITCHEN RENTAL - 211info
text: JOSEPHINE COUNTY FARM COLLECTIVE KITCHEN RENTAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a commercial food processing kitchen focused on smaller farms and market gardeners, with appliances for freeze drying, garlic peeling, and dehydrating. The kitchen does not have an oven, and a maximum of 10 people are allowed on site. 485 Daily Lane Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday/Thursday/Saturday/Sunday 8am-8pm, Friday limited hours may be available Email (530) 304-3754 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (530) 304-3754 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website. Long-term tenant reservations will take priority over single or event use. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Josephine County SITE HOURS: Monday-Wednesday 8am-4pm Services: Business Development Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - EMERGENCY FOOD ASSISTANCE FOOD - MARKETPLACE LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JOSEPHINE COUNTY FARM COLLECTIVE
